name_en: OHANEL New 2.55 Classic Double Flap 🚩🚩🚩 New Denim CF 25C Hidden Style 🙈 Was it really beautiful at first glance? I just 🤩🤩 love this simple style, it's more versatile and durable 💖 The special thing is that usually the shoulder strap is light blue leather chain, this pairing with a black leather chain shoulder strap is more high-end and retro! Fashionable item! Size: 25cm!
